title: Test Execution Evidence Index v2
description: Normalized per-test execution evidence (.shipwright/compliance/test-evidence-index.json), produced by the execution_evidence reader from JUnit/Playwright/Vitest runner output and consumed by the test_links collector to decide coverage-at-layer (Spec test-traceability-across-layers.md sec 11 R1 / G5). status + executed are a FROZEN closed vocabulary: an out-of-vocab value is a schema violation, so a producer/consumer can never trust an un-normalized evidence value. 'ok' coverage requires status=enabled AND executed=pass; a skipped/not_run/missing test is fail-closed, never a pass.

schema_version.description: Pinned evidence-index schema version. Travels with the manifest v2 schema.

_comment.description: Optional human note (harness fixtures carry one).

generated_at.description: Optional ISO-8601 timestamp of when the reader emitted the index (freshness/staleness audit).

source_reports.description: Optional list of the raw runner reports this index was derived from (project-root-relative). Empty/absent => no fresh runner evidence backed this index; a gate must not trust a prior run's passes (R3).

results.description: Per-test evidence keyed to the collector's stable `path::name` test id.

waivers.description: Explicit expiring waivers for a required layer that genuinely cannot run in an environment (R1). Honored only while valid; an expired/incomplete waiver is fail-closed (never a self-reported pass).

status.description: Static disposition of the test in source (frozen vocab, mirrors testLink.status).

executed.description: Observed result from this run's runner evidence (frozen vocab, mirrors testLink.executed). Only 'pass' + status 'enabled' yields coverage 'ok' (R1).

runner.description: Which runner produced the evidence (pytest | playwright | vitest | ...), for audit provenance.

waiver.description: A layer-scoped expiring waiver. Every field is accountability metadata; a waiver missing any is not honored (fail-closed).

scope.description: Optional FR key (namespace::FR-XX.YY) the waiver applies to, or '*' for every FR at this layer. Absent => '*'.

reason.description: Why this layer cannot run in this environment.

ticket.description: Tracking ticket that must retire the waiver.

expires.description: ISO-8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD). The reader fails closed once now > expires.
